notes: Solid, well-structured Snake implementation with audio, pause, win state, high score persistence, and directional eyes on the head; minor issue with self-collision logic (tail exclusion when eating could allow edge-case overlap) but overall nearly complete and polished.
An exceptionally well-crafted Snake game with complete features, great retro visuals, sound effects, and robust logic, only slightly missing a true input queue for rapid multi-turn maneuvers.

A solid and complete Snake implementation with pause/title/win states and proper growth/collision logic, but it is not flawless due to likely WebAudio/localStorage edge-case errors and a minor title prompt inconsistency versus actual start keys.
